body_txt: Lacking any modern arrangement while living or traveling in the wild, or just roughing out, a woman is taking a bath in a natural body of water (sea, river, lake, pond, waterfall ...) in the outdoors. Of course, this means she is naked outside of the privacy of her own home, and that means some man is inevitably going to stumble on her. Mostly done for Fanservice and ship teasing . More often than not, this is entirely accidental from the man in question , who didn't plan on doing any Girl Watching . Sometimes the woman was loud enough to draw him closer; if there was a serious reason for her commotion, like a water monster attacking, he'll probably be forgiven . But in most cases, the man's just passing by for whatever reason (perhaps he was going to take a bath too) and now he's having a hard time ( heh heh... ) looking away. If the woman realizes The Peeping Tom is watching her, Pervert Revenge Mode is almost guaranteed. (Unless she's a Shameless Fanservice Girl , then she'll either find she likes being watched , decide to tease the peeper , or even more rarely, invite him to have a Two-Person Pool Party .) This is especially common in Anime & Manga , since they are more likely to include outdoor bathing in the first place (via Hot Springs or Drum Bathing ). Often reminds women that they Can't Bathe Without a Weapon . Can easily lead to Gone Swimming, Clothes Stolen or a Naked First Impression . If it's the girl's first appearance, then she's Naked on Arrival . As shown by the mythological examples below, this is Older Than Feudalism .
